'''鈭歞h-s-g''' ('''kadhasag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarm|yarm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarm|yarm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-s-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadhasag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhasag|thidhasag]] || [[word:jidhasag|jidhasag]] || [[word:shidhasag|shidhasag]] || [[word:kidhasag|kidhasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhasag|thuthudhasag]] || [[word:jujudhasag|jujudhasag]] || [[word:shushudhasag|shushudhasag]] || [[word:kukudhasag|kukudhasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhasag|thudhasag]] || [[word:judhasag|judhasag]] || [[word:shudhasag|shudhasag]] || [[word:kudhasag|kudhasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhasag|thudhasag]] || [[word:judhasag|judhasag]] || [[word:shudhasag|shudhasag]] || [[word:kudhasag|kudhasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhasag|thedhasag]] || [[word:jedhasag|jedhasag]] || [[word:shedhasag|shedhasag]] || [[word:kedhasag|kedhasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhasag|thothodhasag]] || [[word:jojodhasag|jojodhasag]] || [[word:shoshodhasag|shoshodhasag]] || [[word:kokodhasag|kokodhasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhasag|thodhasag]] || [[word:jodhasag|jodhasag]] || [[word:shodhasag|shodhasag]] || [[word:kodhasag|kodhasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhasag|thodhasag]] || [[word:jodhasag|jodhasag]] || [[word:shodhasag|shodhasag]] || [[word:kodhasag|kodhasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]] || [[word:dhasag|dhasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhasag|th忙dhasag]] || [[word:j忙dhasag|j忙dhasag]] || [[word:sh忙dhasag|sh忙dhasag]] || [[word:k忙dhasag|k忙dhasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhasag|thathadhasag]] || [[word:jajadhasag|jajadhasag]] || [[word:shashadhasag|shashadhasag]] || [[word:kakadhasag|kakadhasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhasag|thadhasag]] || [[word:jadhasag|jadhasag]] || [[word:shadhasag|shadhasag]] || [[word:kadhasag|kadhasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhasag|thadhasag]] || [[word:jadhasag|jadhasag]] || [[word:shadhasag|shadhasag]] || [[word:kadhasag|kadhasag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhasag|shadhasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhasag|goshadhasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhasag|gokishadhasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhasagn眉|shadhasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkn眉|goshadhasagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasagn眉|gokishadhasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhasagsh毛|shadhasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhasagnksh毛|goshadhasagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhasagsh毛|gokishadhasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasagro|shadhasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkro|goshadhasagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasagro|gokishadhasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasagmu|shadhasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkmu|goshadhasagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasagmu|gokishadhasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhasagsher|shadhasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhasagnksher|goshadhasagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhasagsher|gokishadhasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhasagng|shadhasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkng|goshadhasagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhasagng|gokishadhasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhasagya|shadhasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkya|goshadhasagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhasagya|gokishadhasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhasagyam|shadhasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkyam|goshadhasagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhasagyam|gokishadhasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasagn眉sh毛|shadhasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkn眉sh毛|goshadhasagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasagn眉sh毛|gokishadhasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasagn眉ro|shadhasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkn眉ro|goshadhasagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasagn眉ro|gokishadhasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasagn眉mu|shadhasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkn眉mu|goshadhasagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasagn眉mu|gokishadhasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasagsh毛n眉|shadhasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasagnksh毛n眉|goshadhasagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasagsh毛n眉|gokishadhasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasagsh毛ro|shadhasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasagnksh毛ro|goshadhasagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasagsh毛ro|gokishadhasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasagsh毛mu|shadhasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasagnksh毛mu|goshadhasagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasagsh毛mu|gokishadhasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasagron眉|shadhasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkron眉|goshadhasagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasagron眉|gokishadhasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasagrosh毛|shadhasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkrosh毛|goshadhasagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasagrosh毛|gokishadhasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasagromu|shadhasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkromu|goshadhasagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasagromu|gokishadhasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasagmun眉|shadhasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkmun眉|goshadhasagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasagmun眉|gokishadhasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasagmush毛|shadhasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkmush毛|goshadhasagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasagmush毛|gokishadhasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasagmuro|shadhasagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasagnkmuro|goshadhasagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasagmuro|gokishadhasagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
